prompt_text: Suggest a grocery list for a family of four for one week. Our total budget is $60.
response_text:
# Weekly Grocery List for 4 People ($60 Budget)

## Proteins ($18)
- Eggs (2 dozen) - $6
- Chicken thighs (3 lbs) - $7
- Canned tuna (3 cans) - $3
- Peanut butter - $2

## Grains & Carbs ($12)
- Rice (2 lbs) - $3
- Pasta (2 boxes) - $2
- Oats - $2
- Bread (2 loaves) - $4
- Potatoes (5 lbs) - $3

## Vegetables ($15)
- Carrots (2 lbs) - $2
- Onions (3 lbs) - $2
- Cabbage (1 head) - $2
- Canned beans (4 cans) - $3
- Frozen mixed vegetables (2 bags) - $4
- Bananas (1 bunch) - $1
- Apples (3 lbs) - $2

## Dairy & Basics ($12)
- Milk (1 gallon) - $3
- Cheese (8 oz) - $3
- Butter - $3
- Oil & salt - $3

## Tips to Stretch Your Budget
- Cook in bulk and use leftovers for multiple meals
- Eggs are affordable protein for breakfast or dinner
- Rice and pasta are filling staples
- Buy store brands
- Plan meals around what's on sale
